Description: Cortex-M4F 170MHz MCU, 512KB Flash, 128KB SRAM, HRTIM, 2x ADC, 2x DAC, FMAC, CORDIC
Ultrasonic VGA with LNA, 0-55 dB gain, 100MHz
200 ps propagation GaN half-bridge driver, 2A peak
HV boost controller (100V), for negative HV rail
BNC or LEMO connector for ultrasonic probe
650V 12A GaN HEMT (HV pulser FET) — or IRF830 for ≤150V
TVS diode for probe ESD protection
Schottky diode pair for envelope detector
8 MHz crystal for STM32 HSI calibration
10uF bulk decoupling for VDD and VDDA
4-layer 2oz copper PCB, 2 oz for HV, ENIG finish
ABS plastic rugged enclosure, rubber overmold
